――それは、深き淵の底から生まれた。: ――It was born from the depths of a deep abyss.
そして、上へ上へと目指し、這い登ってゆく。<br>希望の奥底から生まれ、絶望の待:
And it aimed upward, upward, crawling its way toward the surface.
Born from the depths of hope, toward the land where despair awaits.
地上を目指す冷たい眼差しは、そして、今、見つめている。<br>闇深き大穴の底を目:
Its cold gaze fixed on the surface now turns, now watches the young
men who press toward the bottom of the dark and deep abyss.
